title: Infinite Space: The Architecture of John Lautner
original_title: Infinite Space: The Architecture of John Lautner
overview: Infinite Space, a documentary feature film, traces the lifelong quest of visionary genius John Lautner to create “architecture that has no beginning and no end.”  It is the story of brilliance and of a complicated life – and the most sensual architecture of the 20th century.
